zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Hudson於大約1645年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州時，她的父親John Hudson34歲，母親Mary Jackson25歲。她和David Fowler至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1702年10月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可里士滿享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hudson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Hudde (see Hudd ) + -son. This surname is also established in Ireland.

variants.name: Hodsdon
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire and Middlesex): habitational name from Hoddesdon (Hertfordshire), from an Old English personal name Hodd (genitive Hoddes) + dūn ‘hill’. The surname was probably confused with Hudson .

History: The earliest known bearer of this name is Norman de Hoddesdon, recorded in 1165–66. The surname was taken to America by Nicholas Hodsdon c. 1628, from whom probably all current US bearers of the name are descended.

variants.name: Hodson
meanings: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Hod(e), a variant of Ode, + -son. See Ott and Oates .

variants.name: Hudd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hudde (Anglo-Norman French Hud(de)), a pet form of Hue; see Hugh .

variants.name: Hutson
meanings: variant of Hotston, perhaps a habitational name from a lost place in Harting (Sussex), from an Old English personal name Hod (genitive Hoddes) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. It may survive in the name Hudsons Copse in that parish, in which case it could be a source of the surnames Hotson, Hodson, Hudson, and Hutson in Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Hudson was born about 1645, in Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, John Hudson, was 34 and her mother, Mary Jackson, was 25. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with David Fowler. She died on 21 October 1702, in Richmond, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Hudson est née environ 1645, à Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Hudson, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mary Jackson, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec David Fowler. Elle est décédée le 21 octobre 1702, à Richmond, Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Hudson um 1645 in Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hudson 34 und ihre Mutter Mary Jackson 25. Sie hatte mit David Fowler mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Oktober 1702 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Richmond, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Hudson(이)가 대략 1645년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hudson(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Jackson(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 David Fowler(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1702년 10월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코 리ch몽에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Hudson родилась около 1645 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Hudson было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Jackson, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от David Fowler. Она умерла 21 октября 1702 г. в местности ричмонд, хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 58 лет.
